description_long: This is a single slip-on shoe with a woven-texture upper in a light cream or off-white color. The shoe features a rounded toe and a low-cut opening, with a soft, flexible structure that suggests comfort and casual use. The sole is a light tan color and appears to be made of rubber or a similar material, with a subtle, shallow tread pattern visible at the heel. The interior is lined with a smooth fabric, and a fabric label is sewn into the heel area, though the brand is not clearly legible. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible laces, buckles, or decorative elements. The shoe appears clean and in excellent condition, suitable for indoor or light outdoor urban environments.
description: A cream-colored slip-on shoe with a woven-texture upper and a light tan rubber sole, featuring a minimalist and comfortable design.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the woven-texture upper, rounded toe, and interior label.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the low-cut opening, woven upper, and the transition to the tan sole.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the heel area and the visible tread pattern on the sole.
description_view_3: Side profile view displaying the full length of the shoe, the smooth upper, and the sole's edge.
